summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reframed the chapter opening away from a wake-up construction to flow more cleanly out of chapter 9, and varied the Monday Keating re-entry imagery to reduce structural and sensory echo with chapter 11's opening.
edits: Recast the first paragraph to open on the cold hotel room rather than Leela waking.
Adjusted the Monday campus re-entry description so it no longer repeats chapter 11's wet-wool/hot-dust opening scaffold.
